title: "measureBlocks()"
description: "Measure a block list while sharing a measurement cache across text blocks."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Measure a block list while sharing a measurement cache across text blocks.

## Import

```ts
import { measureBlocks } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function measureBlocks(
	blocks: readonly ContentBlock[],
	opts: MeasureBlockOptions,
): readonly MeasuredBlock[]
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `blocks` | `readonly ContentBlock[]` | blocks value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `MeasureBlockOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `readonly MeasuredBlock[]` value.

## Example

```ts
import { measureBlocks } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/block.ts`
